chapter_title.ar: باب فَضْلِ ارْتِبَاطِ الْخَيْلِ وَ إِجْرَائِهَا وَ الرَّمْيِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 22 – Merits of bridling the cavalry horses and injuring them, and the throwing (Archery)

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: كالموثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/390)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: كالموثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/390)
text: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) فِي قَوْلِ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ وَ أَعِدُّوا لَهُمْ مَا اسْتَطَعْتُمْ  مِنْ قُوَّةٍ وَ مِنْ رِباطِ الْخَيْلِ قَالَ الرَّمْيُ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Imran Bin Musa, from Al Hassan Bin Tareyf, from Abdullah Bin Al Mugheira, raising it, said,
‘Rasool-Allahsaww said regarding the Words of Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic [8:60] And prepare against them whatever force you can and horses tied at the frontier: ‘The archery’.
en.sarwar: 11. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Muhammad ibn Yahya from Talhah ibn Zayd from abu ‘Abd Allah who has narrated the following from his ancestors: “Sharp shooting is an arrow of the arrows of al-Islam.”
